# SquarePic — Free Online Image Editor
# https://www.squarepic.io

SquarePic is a free, privacy-first online image editor. All processing happens entirely in your browser via HTML5 Canvas — images are never uploaded to any server. No signup, no watermarks, no tracking. Open source on GitHub.

## About
SquarePic lets you resize, crop, compress, and convert images locally in your browser. Created by SevenOneLabs. Supports PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF, AVIF, and ICO formats.

## Core Tools
- Square Image Editor (make any photo square with blur/solid/crop): https://www.squarepic.io
- Image Compressor (reduce file size with quality slider or target-size mode): https://www.squarepic.io/compressor
- Image Converter (convert between 8 formats, batch mode): https://www.squarepic.io/converter
- Photo Cropper (interactive crop with aspect ratio presets): https://www.squarepic.io/cropper
- HD Image Upscaler (upscale images 2x, 3x, or 4x with bicubic interpolation and smart sharpening): https://www.squarepic.io/upscaler
- Image Size Calculator (find social media dimensions by search or platform): https://www.squarepic.io/image-size-calculator

## Platform Size Guides (13 platforms)
- Instagram image sizes: https://www.squarepic.io/resize/instagram
- Facebook image sizes: https://www.squarepic.io/resize/facebook
- X (Twitter) image sizes: https://www.squarepic.io/resize/x-twitter
- LinkedIn image sizes: https://www.squarepic.io/resize/linkedin

- Reddit image sizes: https://www.squarepic.io/resize/reddit
- Telegram image sizes: https://www.squarepic.io/resize/telegram
- Discord image sizes: https://www.squarepic.io/resize/discord

## Format Converters (12+ conversion pairs)
- PNG to JPG: https://www.squarepic.io/converter/png-to-jpg
- JPG to PNG: https://www.squarepic.io/converter/jpg-to-png
- PNG to WebP: https://www.squarepic.io/converter/png-to-webp
- JPG to WebP: https://www.squarepic.io/converter/jpg-to-webp
- WebP to PNG: https://www.squarepic.io/converter/webp-to-png
- WebP to JPG: https://www.squarepic.io/converter/webp-to-jpg
- PNG to GIF: https://www.squarepic.io/converter/png-to-gif
- JPG to GIF: https://www.squarepic.io/converter/jpg-to-gif
- PNG to ICO: https://www.squarepic.io/converter/png-to-ico
- JPG to ICO: https://www.squarepic.io/converter/jpg-to-ico
- PNG to AVIF: https://www.squarepic.io/converter/png-to-avif
- JPG to AVIF: https://www.squarepic.io/converter/jpg-to-avif
- WebP to AVIF: https://www.squarepic.io/converter/webp-to-avif
- WebP to GIF: https://www.squarepic.io/converter/webp-to-gif

### Guides
- Social Media Image Sizes 2026: Complete Cheat Sheet: https://www.squarepic.io/guides/social-media-image-sizes-2026
  Complete dimensions reference for all 13 platforms with aspect ratios and image types.
- Instagram Image Sizes 2026: Feed, Carousel & Profile: https://www.squarepic.io/guides/instagram-feed-sizes-2026
  Complete guide to Instagram feed post dimensions, carousel specs, profile picture sizes, and ad formats.
- Instagram Reels & Stories Guide 2026: https://www.squarepic.io/guides/instagram-reels-stories-guide
  Complete guide to Instagram Reels and Stories dimensions with safe zones, format tips, and engagement strategies.
- LinkedIn Image Sizes 2026: Banner, Profile & Post Dimensions: https://www.squarepic.io/guides/linkedin-image-sizes-2026
  Complete guide to LinkedIn image dimensions for 2026.
- Facebook Image Sizes 2026: Cover Photo, Profile & Post Dimensions: https://www.squarepic.io/guides/facebook-image-sizes-2026
  Complete guide to Facebook image dimensions for 2026.
- Pinterest Image Sizes 2026: Pin Dimensions & Board Cover Guide: https://www.squarepic.io/guides/pinterest-image-sizes-2026
  Complete guide to Pinterest image dimensions for 2026.

  Complete guide to Discord image dimensions for 2026.

  Complete guide to YouTube image dimensions for 2026.

  Complete guide to TikTok image dimensions for 2026.

- Terms of Service: https://www.squarepic.io/terms

## Key Features
- All processing is client-side via HTML5 Canvas — images never leave your device
- No signup, no accounts, no personal data collected
- No watermarks or branding added to exported images
- Open source on GitHub (https://github.com/Sevenonelabs/square_pic)
- Export formats: PNG, JPEG, WebP, BMP, GIF, ICO, AVIF, TIFF
- Import formats: PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF, AVIF, ICO (up to 20 MB)
- Batch compress with quality slider or target-size mode
- Batch convert between 8 image formats
- Interactive crop with 8 drag handles, aspect ratio lock, zoom and pan
- 13 social media platform presets with correct dimensions
- Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile browsers
- 100% free — no trials, no credit cards, no limits

## Compression Research Data (2026)
- WebP at quality 80%: 36 KB for a 1920x1080 photo (vs 52 KB JPEG, 412 KB PNG)
- AVIF at quality 80%: 23 KB — 55-83% smaller than JPEG
- AVIF at quality 70-80% recommended for maximum performance
- WebP at quality 75-85% recommended for balance of quality and compatibility
- PNG remains essential for transparency and lossless quality (logos, screenshots)
- Data sourced from SquarePic internal testing with browser-grade encoders

## Social Media Square Dimensions (quick reference)
- Instagram: 1080x1080 (feed), 320x320 (profile)
- Facebook: 1200x1200 (post), 180x180 (profile)
- LinkedIn: 1200x1200 (post), 400x400 (profile)
- X/Twitter: 1200x1200 (post), 400x400 (profile)
- TikTok: 1080x1080 (post), 200x200 (profile)
- YouTube: 1280x1280 (thumbnail safe zone), 800x800 (profile)
